Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of a majority stake in Sadaf Technologies FZ-LLC by Alnair Holdings PJSC (non-binding, for discussion only).
Parties: Buyer — Alnair Holdings PJSC; Seller — Marabit Capital SPV Ltd; Target — Sadaf Technologies FZ-LLC (all entities are UAE-based and fictional).
Corporate identifiers (placeholders): Buyer Dubai Trade Licence TL-00000000; Buyer ADGM Commercial Registration ADGM-CR-9999999; Target Free Zone Licence FZL-123456-X (formats illustrative, not validated).
Regulatory context: subject to applicable UAE federal securities laws and free zone market-abuse regimes (DIFC/ADGM); at term sheet stage no onshore filing is required and no non-public price-sensitive information is being shared.
Structure and consideration: to be agreed following confirmatory due diligence; no commitment to issue or purchase securities; not price sensitive and not intended to influence trading in any market.
KYC/AML: for signatory verification only, Buyer to verify Emirates ID 784-2001-1234567-4 of the Authorised Signatory; Family-origin (for KYC form only): [Not Collected].
Conditions precedent: standard corporate approvals, free zone NOC if applicable, competition and foreign ownership checks (if any), and tax clearance; TRN (form label) TRN 1234567890123456 (format not validated).
No MNPI: the parties confirm the Target’s exploration of strategic options has already been publicly announced on the Target’s website on 15 March 2025; no confidential projections, client lists, or unpublished results will be provided before a clean team protocol is agreed.
Notices and contacts: role mailbox legal@alnair-holdings.example.ae; general enquiries helpline +971 800 0000 (public line); no personal numbers or private emails to be used for this process.
Address for service (form fields): P.O. Box [________], Emirate [________], Building [________], Unit [________]; for corporate correspondence only.
Bank and settlement (placeholders): Account Name [To be provided]; IBAN AE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 000 (illustrative only); settlement mechanics to be documented in the SPA.
Identification (form fields): Passport No 000000000; UAE Visa File No 123/2020/0000000; do not send copies by email; only on-site verification at the data room.
Governing law and forum: UAE law; disputes to be heard by a competent free zone court; bilingual Arabic/English versions to be prepared for execution.
Exchange/listing context: if any post-closing listing or admission to trading is contemplated, it will follow applicable disclosure standards and market conduct rules; this document is not an offer to the public.
Exclusivity and break fees: none at the term sheet stage; either party may terminate discussions without liability except for confidentiality and clean team obligations.
